_comment: Single source of truth for AmeriDex dealers. To add a dealer: copy the Guy C Lee block, change the slug + values, and you are done. Pages and the Where to Buy lookup read from this file at runtime. Territories must NOT overlap (we treat them as exclusive).

_schema.slug: URL-safe id, used for /dealers/<slug>.html and the dealer cookie value.
_schema.name: Legal/dba name shown on the dealer card.
_schema.location_label: City, ST shown next to the name.
_schema.url_external: Optional. Link to the dealer's own location page.
_schema.logo: Optional. Path under assets/img/dealers/. Leave blank if no logo yet.
_schema.email: Where quote/contact submissions are sent (will be CC'd to AmeriDex).
_schema.contact_person: Optional. Salesperson/manager name shown on the card.
_schema.lat: Decimal latitude of the store. Used for radius fallback.
_schema.service_radius_miles: Hard cap on radius matching. Matches outside this radius are rejected even if no other dealer covers the ZIP.
_schema.zip_prefixes: Array of 3-digit ZIP prefixes (e.g. "294") that this dealer exclusively covers. This is the primary match. Radius is the fallback.

dealers.name: Guy C Lee Building Supply
dealers.hours: Mon–Thu 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM · Fri 7:00 AM – 2:00 PM
